creator: rea@FreeBSD.org
text:
Torsten, good day.

Martin Matuska created a number of PRs with updates of PG:
  http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/161328
  http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/161329
  http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/161330
  http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/161331
  http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/161332

Cuold you, please, test (some of) the updates and report back
in respective PRs?

Thanks!
--
